data.current_description: Create a resource for on-boarding an application package to a MEO

The request body must contain the application package details as specified in the CreateAppPkg schema. Upon successful creation, returns the onboarded AppPkgInfo resource with a 201 status code and Location header containing the URI of the newly created resource. The application package transitions to the onboarded state.
